initial_diagnostic_question.question: Does this ECG suggest the presence of typical premature atrial complex(es)?

criterion_selection.question: To accurately diagnose typical premature atrial complexes, which of the following diagnostic criteria should be evaluated?
options: Presence of a fixed, rigid heart rate without variability
Presence of gradual acceleration and deceleration of the heart rate
Presence of an irregularly irregular ventricular rhythm

finding_identification.question: Regarding the criterion you selected, are there any premature beats on this ECG, where a QRS complex occurs earlier than expected time based on the preceding normal cycles?

ecg_grounding.question: In which of the following segments can you observe the premature beat? The options below refer to time ranges on the ECG signal, provided in seconds.

diagnostic_decision.question: Based on the finding identified above, does this ECG suggest the presence of typical premature atrial complex(es)?
options: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis
diagnostic_decision.answer: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis

criterion_selection.question: In addition to the finding you just identified, which other diagnostic criterion should be evaluated to diagnose typical premature atrial complexes?
options: Presence of a different QRS axis in the premature beat compared to normal beats
Presence of pathological Q waves in inferior leads
Absence of significant QRS prolongation in the premature beat compared to normal beats
Presence of a prolonged QRS duration in the premature beat compared to normal beats
Presence of ST elevation in the premature beat
criterion_selection.answer: Absence of significant QRS prolongation in the premature beat compared to normal beats

finding_identification.question: Regarding the criterion you selected, for the QRS complex in the selected segment, is the QRS duration prolonged significantly compared to the normal beats on this ECG?

ecg_grounding.question: Which range does the measured QRS duration for the premature beat fall into?

diagnostic_decision.question: Based on all the findings identified so far, does this ECG suggest the presence of typical premature atrial complex(es)?
options: Further findings are required to confirm the diagnosis
